creator: amdmi3@amdmi3.ru
text:
* Alexander V. Chernikov (melifaro@ipfw.ru) wrote:

> Ups. Please try modified .shar
> 
> * Fix typo: LIB_DEPEND+= instead of LIB_DEPENDS+=
> * Add scrollkeeper depency
> * Add GNOMEHELP option

Still doesn't build.
http://people.freebsd.org/~amdmi3/ekiga3-3.2.6.log

that's fixed by USE_XORG=	xv
next it dies on avahi-client:

--
checking for linux/videodev.h... no
checking for AVAHI... gnome-config: not found
gnome-config: not found
configure: error: Package requirements (avahi-client >= 0.6 avahi-glib >= 0.6) were not met:

No package 'avahi-client' found
No package 'avahi-glib' found

Consider adjusting the PKG_CONFIG_PATH environment variable if you
installed software in a non-standard prefix.
--

Also note that you should depend on gnome stuff with USE_GNOME
(evolutiondataserver, gconf etc.). For this to work correctly, include
bsd.port.pre.mk should be placed just before targets, after all
conditions.

-- 
Dmitry Marakasov   .   55B5 0596 FF1E 8D84 5F56  9510 D35A 80DD F9D2 F77D
amdmi3@amdmi3.ru  ..:  jabber: amdmi3@jabber.ru    http://www.amdmi3.ru
